PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>

  ?member wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
  ?member wdt:P19 ?birthPlace .
  ?birthPlace rdfs:label ?birthPlaceLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?birthPlaceLabel) = "en")
}
